name: Delicious Seed Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to either "regular" or "quick".
2. Mix all ingredients in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it on a baking sheet.
4. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 30-40 minutes, or until golden brown and crusty.
5. Remove from the oven and let cool before slicing and serving. Enjoy the crunchy crust and delightful flavor!
